Name: Add an ORDER BY clause to ensure sorted output. SSIS Merge Join requires sorted inputs and produces a sorted output.
Description: ADD AN ORDER BY CLAUSE TO ENSURE SORTED OUTPUT. THE SSIS MERGE JOIN TRANSFORMATION ASSUMES SORTED INPUTS AND NATURALLY PRODUCES A SORTED, DETERMINISTIC OUTPUT. THE EQUIVALENT SQL JOIN DOES NOT GUARANTEE ORDER.

Description: SSIS CONTROL FLOW ELEMENT Microsoft.ScriptTask CANNOT BE CONVERTED TO SNOWFLAKE SCRIPTING.
